reference: LASTLY THE MINISTER WENT IN AND KISSED THE GROUND BEFORE ZAU AL MAKAN WHO ROSE TO MEET HIM SAYING WELCOME O WAZIR AND SIRE SANS PEER
text: lastly the minister went in and kissed the ground before zaw al makan who rose to meet him saying welcome o wazir and sire's son's peer zaw al makan who rose to meet him saying welcome o wazir and sire's son's peer zaw al makan who rose to meet him saying welcome o wazir and sire's son's peer
